summary: Iter7 - Verified the re-added KPI grid and Liquidita cards inside the Brogliaccio tab (Prima Nota). Backend: 6/6 pytest PASS confirming the brogliaccio response now exposes both 'riepilogo_kpi' (7 fields) and 'liquidita' (5 fields) with correct cumulative math. Frontend: both data-testids 'brog-kpi' and 'brog-liquidita' render inside the Brogliaccio tab with all 7 KPI cards (Crediti label renamed to Sospesi) and both Liquidita cards (Disponibile + Postera). Saldo Cassa per Compagnia panel still shows the 3 expected columns. No separate Statistiche tab present.
critical_code_review_comments: _compute_brogliaccio correctly computes the 'liquidita' object cumulatively up to and including the requested data_giorno (uses {'$lte': data_giorno} in aggregates).

liquidita.saldo_cassa_compagnie is the SUM of saldi_compagnie[].saldo_cassa (verified). Note: riepilogo_kpi.saldo_cassa is a DIFFERENT value (per-day saldo of the giornata) - this is intentional. The frontend KPI card 'Saldo Cassa Cmp.' correctly binds to b.liquidita.saldo_cassa_compagnie (not riepilogo_kpi.saldo_cassa) - confirmed in BrogliaccioTab.jsx:287.

liquidita math validated against returned values: liquidita_disponibile == sum_conti - sospesi_attivi - saldo_cassa_compagnie; liquidita_postera == sum_conti - saldo_cassa_compagnie. Tested for both today and -30 days.
BrogliaccioTab.jsx renders KPI grid (data-testid='brog-kpi') and Liquidita grid (data-testid='brog-liquidita') guarded by truthy checks (b.riepilogo_kpi && / b.liquidita &&) - safe rendering.

Frontend uses b.riepilogo_kpi.crediti as the value for the renamed 'Sospesi' KPI label - that is consistent with the existing backend field name (crediti) so no backend rename was needed. Good non-breaking change.

StatisticheTab.jsx file still exists in /app/frontend/src/components but is no longer imported/routed (verified Statistiche tab count = 0 in Contabilita). Harmless dead code; could be cleaned up later.
seed_data_creation: None - tests are read-only GETs against existing seeded data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Brogliaccio response shape: { data, conti_cassa, righe, totali_giornata, conti_riepilogo, saldi_compagnie, riepilogo_kpi:{entrate,provvigioni,crediti,rimesse,sconti,spese,saldo_cassa}, liquidita:{sum_conti,sospesi_attivi,saldo_cassa_compagnie,liquidita_disponibile,liquidita_postera}, chiusura, chiusa }. IMPORTANT: riepilogo_kpi.saldo_cassa (per-day) is different from liquidita.saldo_cassa_compagnie (cumulative). The frontend's 7th KPI card 'Saldo Cassa Cmp.' binds to liquidita.saldo_cassa_compagnie, not riepilogo_kpi.saldo_cassa. The 'Sospesi' KPI label is mapped to riepilogo_kpi.crediti (no backend field rename).
rca of the issue: User reported 'pirma nota mancano tutti i quasti' (Prima Nota missing all KPIs). Issue was caused by accidental removal in iter6 of the KPI grid + Liquidita cards from BrogliaccioTab.jsx. Main agent re-added them with 'Crediti' label renamed to 'Sospesi' and a new 'liquidita' object in the backend brogliaccio response. Fix verified end-to-end: backend math correct, frontend renders all required testids/labels, Saldo Cassa per Compagnia panel preserved, no separate Statistiche tab.
